scope: Materialize the 100-agent pilot cluster bundle into a repo-local working directory

decision_context.prior_state: The pilot had a valid cluster bundle and recombine path, but the cluster packets still lived only inside generated JSON artifacts.
decision_context.decision: Add a materialization command that writes a README plus one JSON file per cluster packet into a dedicated working directory.
decision_context.why_now: The next bottleneck is actual collection, so the repo needed a direct working surface rather than another combined packet.

files_expected.purpose: Adds the materialization command and writes the working directory.
Covers the per-cluster directory materialization flow.
Stores the manifest of written cluster files.
Provides the operator-facing index for the working directory.

planned_steps: Write the cluster bundle into a repo-local working directory
Emit a manifest of the written files
Verify the new command with the focused regression suite

commands: $env:PYTHONPATH='src'; python -m chip_labs.cli mirofish-discovery-program-materialize --input research/meta/MIROFISH_DISCOVERY_PROGRAM_PILOT_100_CLUSTER_PACKETS_2026-03-24.json --output-dir research/meta/mirofish_discovery_pilot_100_clusters_2026-03-24 --index-title "MiroFish Discovery Pilot 100 Clusters" --output research/meta/MIROFISH_DISCOVERY_PROGRAM_PILOT_100_CLUSTER_DIRECTORY_2026-03-24.json
$env:PYTHONPATH='src'; python -m pytest tests/test_mirofish_discovery.py tests/test_watchtower.py tests/test_mirofish_portfolio.py tests/test_trend_prediction.py -q
expected_checks: The materialized directory contains README.md plus 10 cluster packet files
The manifest lists 11 written files total
The focused regression suite stays green

guardrails: Do not fabricate filled discovery candidates while materializing the directory
Keep the files repo-local under research/meta
Preserve the exact cluster allocation already defined by the pilot scaffold
